Hero.heading: Home
Hero.description: Assurance Genevoise supports you throughout Switzerland with personalized insurance solutions and a trusted network of partners.

Hero.heading: Votre projet d’installation
Hero.description: Une solution complète et sur mesure pour trouver votre logement idéal à Genève, gérer vos démarches avec simplicité et réussir votre installation en toute sérénité.

items.title: Entretien de découverte
items.description: Un premier échange pour comprendre vos besoins, vos critères et votre situation personnelle, afin de définir ensemble la stratégie de recherche la plus pertinente et vous proposer un accompagnement sur mesure.

items.title: Constitution de votre dossier
items.description: Nous constituons pour vous un dossier solide et attractif, conforme aux attentes des propriétaires, afin de maximiser vos chances d'obtenir rapidement un logement.

items.title: Analyse du marché
items.description: Grâce à nos outils et à notre réseau, nous analysons en temps réel les offres disponibles selon vos critères, en tenant compte de la dynamique locale et des opportunités correspondant à votre profil et à vos priorités.

items.title: Propositions de biens
items.description: Nous vous envoyons une sélection de logements qui répondent à vos attentes, afin d’orienter vos visites vers les biens les plus adaptés à votre projet.

items.title: Organisation des visites
items.description: Nous planifions les visites selon vos disponibilités, en assurant la coordination entre vous, les propriétaires et les régies pour vous simplifier la démarche.

items.title: Envoi et suivi de votre dossier
items.description: Nous soumettons votre dossier aux régies ou bailleurs et assurons un suivi rigoureux, en relançant et en intervenant si nécessaire pour accélérer le processus.

items.title: Formalités administratives
items.description: Nous vous accompagnons dans toutes les démarches administratives telles que la lecture et signature du bail, la mise en place des contrats d’assurances et de garantie, et autres formalités essentielles.

items.title: Aide à l’emménagement
items.description: Nous vous aidons dans l’organisation pratique de votre installation : emménagement, souscription aux services essentiels (internet, électricité) et recommandations personnalisées pour faciliter votre prise de repères.

items.title: Support après l’installation
items.description: Notre accompagnement continue après votre emménagement : conseils, gestion des premiers besoins, aide en cas de problème ou pour toute adaptation nécessaire à votre nouvelle vie en Suisse.

ContactFeature.heading: Nos offres
ContactFeature.description: Une expérience client irréprochable et un accompagnement clé-en-main afin de trouver votre nouveau logement, faciliter votre installation et vous aider à vous sentir rapidement chez vous.

reasonItems.title: Recherche de propriétés
reasonItems.description: À la suite d’un premier rendez-vous de découverte, nous prenons le temps de sélectionner avec soins des propriétés parfaitement adaptées à votre besoins, vos souhaits et vos critères.

reasonItems.title: Visites accompagnées et visites à distance
reasonItems.description: Nous organisons vos visites et vous accompagnons pour vous apporter un regard professionnel. Si vous êtes à distance, nous réalisons également des visites virtuelles détaillées.

reasonItems.title: Support administratif et suivi
reasonItems.description: Nous assurons avec vous la préparation de votre dossier de candidature afin de maximiser vos chances, et restons à vos côtés jusqu’à la signature définitive du bail.

reasonItems.title: Services de conciergerie
reasonItems.description: Ouverture de compte bancaire, assurance habitation, garantie de loyer ou toute autre demande spécifique : notre conciergerie vous accompagne pour simplifier vos démarches et alléger votre quotidien.

StatsGrid.heading: Reliability & transparency
StatsGrid.description: We guide you with clarity, speed, and know-how to provide the right solutions for you.

EngagementFeature.heading: Vous guider vers votre nouveau chez-vous avec soin et expertise.
EngagementFeature.description: Notre équipe s’engage à vous accompagner avec excellence et intégrité afin de réussir votre installation en Suisse dans les meilleures conditions.

reasonItems.title: Engagement
reasonItems.description: Un accompagnement dédié et une volonté de satisfaire vos besoins à chaque étape.

reasonItems.title: Expertise
reasonItems.description: Des conseils adaptés et des solutions précises, pour une installation réussie.

reasonItems.title: Transparence
reasonItems.description: Des relations de confiance avec nos clients et partenaires.

reasonItems.title: Excellence
reasonItems.description: Des services personnalisés et un suivi constant pour vous garantir un excellent résultat.

description.paragraph: Our brokerage firm supports you with high value-added expertise to secure your assets and optimize your insurance coverage.

BookConsultation.description: Nous sommes à votre disposition pour échanger sur votre situation et vous guider vers des solutions adaptées à vos besoins et votre activité.

content.paragraph:
**Company Name:** AG Assurance Genevoise SA 
 **Legal Form:** Public Limited Company (SA) 
 **Registered Office:** Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva, Switzerland 
 **UID Number:** CHE-403.737.582 
 **FINMA Registry Number:** F01502264 
 **Share Capital:** CHF 100,000 
 **Phone:** +41 22 715 17 45 
 **Email:** contact@assurance-genevoise.ch 
 **Hosting Provider:** o2switch ([[https://www.o2switch.fr/|https://www.o2switch.fr/]]) 
 This information is provided clearly and completely.

AG Assurance Genevoise SA strives to provide accurate and up-to-date information on this website. However, it does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of the information provided. The company reserves the right to modify the website content at any time without prior notice.
AG Assurance Genevoise SA disclaims all liability for direct or indirect damages resulting from access to or use of this website, including damages caused by viruses or technical errors.

This website may contain links to other websites. AG Assurance Genevoise SA is not responsible for the content of these external sites and disclaims all liability regarding the information, products, or services they offer.
All content on this website (texts, images, logos, etc.) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, distribution, or use without prior written authorization is prohibited.

content.title: Data Collection and Processing
content.paragraph: We collect and process personal data in accordance with the new Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP). The data collected may include, but is not limited to, name, address, email address, and phone number. This data is used to provide our services, respond to inquiries, and enhance user experience.

content.title: Use of Google Analytics
content.paragraph: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Inc. Google Analytics uses cookies to help analyze website usage. Information generated by the cookies regarding your use of the website will be transmitted to and stored by Google.

content.title: User Rights
content.paragraph: In accordance with the nFADP, you have the right to access your personal data, rectify it, request its deletion, or object to its processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address provided above.

content.title: Data Security
content.paragraph: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction.

This website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies or to notify you when a cookie is sent. However, some website features may not function properly without the use of cookies.
This legal notice is governed by Swiss law. In the event of a dispute, the courts of the Canton of Geneva shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
AG Assurance Genevoise SA reserves the right to modify this legal notice at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the website.

At **AG Assurance Genevoise SA**, we pay particular attention to respecting your privacy. We thank you for using our services and website. We take privacy seriously. This privacy policy applies to any individual who shares personal data directly or indirectly with AG Assurance Genevoise SA by visiting this website.

**AG Assurance Genevoise SA** is a public limited company established in Switzerland and registered at Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva. As such, we comply with the nLPD (New Federal Data Protection Act). Our registered office is located at Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva. If you have any questions about data protection, you can contact us at the following address: [[contact@assurance-genevoise.ch]]. This privacy policy details the types of personal data that may be processed and their purposes.

Please note that this privacy policy concerns the processing of personal data for which AG Assurance Genevoise SA is the data controller. This privacy policy does not cover any processing of personal data that AG Assurance Genevoise SA may perform as a data processor due to your use of our services. For more information about how our services can be used to facilitate the processing of your personal data, and about AG Assurance Genevoise SA's responsibilities and commitments related to this, please refer to the applicable terms and conditions. We apply the nLPD (New Federal Data Protection Act) to all of our procedures.

Personal data refers to information that identifies you as an individual. We may process the following types of personal data concerning you: Your contact details may include your name, email address, and phone number. User information, for example, if you log into any service or visit our websites. This information may include your IP address, device type and browser, time zone, geographic location, as well as your interests and preferences, and information on how you interact with our services, such as features used and buttons clicked.

sections.title: Sharing with Third Parties and Transfers to Third Countries

content.paragraph:
• Google Analytics: Helps analyze website traffic on [[https://assurance-genevoise.ch/|https://assurance-genevoise.ch]]
 • Google Tag Manager: A tag management system that allows marketing managers to easily add tags (Analytics, remarketing, etc.) to their website.
We are obligated to process specific, relevant, and necessary personal data while taking into account our legitimate purposes. You have the right to control this data.
To update the personal data we process about you, please contact us at [[contact@assurance-genevoise.ch]].
To receive a free extract of the personal data we process about you, you can send a registered letter to the following address: AG Assurance Genevoise SA, Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva, Switzerland.

Education.heading: Our service
Education.description: A customized education solution designed to support your children's unique learning journey, ensuring the best opportunities for their growth and success.

content.paragraph: Our school support service aims to simplify and optimize the search for suitable educational institutions for your children, taking into account their aspirations, educational needs, and potential, as well as your family and professional requirements. We guide you through every step of this essential process to ensure each child finds the school environment where they can thrive.

content.title: Presentation of diverse educational options
content.paragraph: We provide an overview of existing possibilities – nurseries, public and private schools, Swiss or international schools, as well as less conventional alternatives – enabling you to select the best opportunities.

content.title: Pre-registration and initial formalities
content.paragraph: Our services include support with the first steps of online pre-registration, ensuring all required formalities are properly completed by the parents.

content.title: Arrangement of meetings
content.paragraph: We organize appointments, either by phone or in person, with school directors or admissions officers, allowing you to have direct exchanges to ask questions and better evaluate the available options.

content.title: Debriefing with the family
content.paragraph: We offer a debriefing session where children and parents can discuss their impressions and refine their choice based on objective and personal criteria.

content.title: Assistance with final enrollment
content.paragraph: Once your choice is made, we assist you with the final enrollment procedure, ensuring all administrative steps are completed smoothly and effectively.

content.title: Support during school visits
content.paragraph: If necessary, we accompany you during school visits to assist you throughout this crucial step. This ensures that all important aspects are reviewed, from the school’s atmosphere to its facilities.
With our expertise, we guarantee high-quality support, simplifying this sometimes complex process and ensuring peace of mind throughout this crucial step.

BookConsultation.heading: Cooperate
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to benefit from our expertise and services?
BookConsultation.description: We are at your disposal to answer your questions and accompany you in the integration of our solutions adapted to your activities.

DiscoverGeneva.heading: Our service
DiscoverGeneva.description: A customized education solution designed to support your children's unique learning journey, ensuring the best opportunities for their growth and success.

content.paragraph: When settling into a new city, it is essential to get familiar with the various neighborhoods to find the one that best suits your lifestyle, needs, and preferences. We offer a tailor-made service to assist you in your search and discovery of Geneva.
Discovering Geneva also means finding the neighborhood that suits you. We guide you through this process with a personalized service, tailored to your lifestyle and expectations.

content.title: Personalized tour
content.paragraph: Based on your search criteria and lifestyle (proximity to downtown, access to public transport, workplaces, etc.), our agent plans a tailored itinerary that allows you to visit several representative neighborhoods in Geneva and better visualize your future living environment.

content.title: Introduction to infrastructure and local businesses
content.paragraph: We introduce you to nearby shops, parks, schools, sports centers, and other key infrastructures so you can quickly get your bearings and organize your daily life independently.

content.title: Personalized recommendations based on your profile
content.paragraph: Depending on your situation — family, expatriate worker, student, retiree — we suggest neighborhoods and practical reference points that align with your daily life and priorities.

content.title: Discovery of cultural and social life
content.paragraph: We guide you through cultural sites, local events, and leisure spaces to help you quickly settle in and fully enjoy the richness Geneva has to offer.

content.title: Tour debriefing
content.paragraph: At the end of the tour, we debrief with you to refine your preferences and select the neighborhoods that best meet your needs and desires.

BookConsultation.heading: Here to support you
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to discover Geneva with our team?
BookConsultation.description: We are available to discuss your situation and guide you toward solutions tailored to your needs and activities.

ConciergeService.heading: Our service
ConciergeService.description: Simplify your daily life with our concierge service.

content.paragraph: Our concierge service simplifies your daily life by responding to all your requests, even the most specific ones. Urgent need, special project, or custom request? We leverage our expertise and a network of reliable partners to offer you quick and effective solutions.

Designed for both individuals and professionals, our service coordinates the intervention of qualified providers: electricians, gardeners, cleaning agents, or specialized service providers. Thanks to our personalized and responsive approach, each request is handled with thoroughness, discretion, and professionalism.

BookConsultation.heading: Here to support you
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to benefit from a personalized concierge service?
BookConsultation.description: We are available to discuss your situation and guide you toward solutions tailored to your needs and activities.

It provides strong legal protection and full private liability coverage in case of a dispute.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about property and asset insurance: protecting your belongings, investments, and financial security.

faqs.question: What assets are covered by property and asset insurance?
faqs.answer: It protects your real estate, personal belongings, and overall assets.

faqs.question: What types of incidents does this insurance cover?
faqs.answer: Property and asset insurance covers you in the event of fire, theft, glass breakage, and water damage.

faqs.question: Can I insure valuable items with property insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, coverage can be arranged for high-value items such as jewelry, artwork, or collectibles.

faqs.question: What exactly does property and asset insurance cover?
faqs.answer: In the event of a claim, the insurance covers the repair of damaged items and their replacement in case of total loss.

faqs.question: What additional coverages are included?
faqs.answer: Private liability and legal protection can be included in your policy.

BookConsultation.subHeading: A question? Our ((advisors)) are here to guide you
BookConsultation.description: Benefit from personalized advice and support that meets your needs.

description.paragraph: Protect your responsibility, your property, and your daily life against material and bodily damage caused to third parties.

reasonItems.description: Cover accidental property and personal damage caused to third parties in your everyday life.

Content.heading: Health & Insurance
Content.subHeading: Why should take a household ((liability)) insurance?

description.paragraph: Although not mandatory in Switzerland, liability insurance (RC) is often required for tenants and highly recommended for homeowners and families.
Our liability insurance solutions ensure your peace of mind and cover damage related to your home and personal belongings.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Protect yourself daily: what private liability insurance covers.

faqs.question: Who is covered by my liability insurance?
faqs.answer: According to your liability insurance contract, you can also cover your family members as well as your pets.

faqs.question: What types of damages are covered by liability insurance?
faqs.answer: Your insurance covers bodily, material, or immaterial damages caused to others.

faqs.question: Can I be covered abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, all liability insurance contracts include coverage abroad.

faqs.question: Does liability insurance cover damages to my own property?
faqs.answer: No, it only covers damages caused to third parties, not to your own property.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know to protect and care for your loyal companion.

faqs.question: Does the insurance cover preventive care like vaccinations?
faqs.answer: Yes, depending on your policy, your insurance includes preventive care such as vaccinations and parasite treatments.

faqs.question: Does the insurance cover accidents outside the home?
faqs.answer: Yes, most policies cover all accidents, whether your pet is at home or elsewhere.

faqs.question: At what age can I insure my pet?
faqs.answer: You can insure your pet at any age, but conditions and coverage may vary.

faqs.question: What should I do if my pet has an accident outside Switzerland?
faqs.answer: Most policies cover veterinary care abroad, but it's important to check the terms and conditions.

description.paragraph: Provides essential protection for your vehicle, passengers, and third-party damages.

reasonItems.description: Covers bodily injury and property damage caused to third parties in the event of an accident.

reasonItems.title: Vehicle Protection
reasonItems.description: Offers compensation in case of theft, fire, glass breakage, or unforeseen natural events.

reasonItems.title: Comprehensive Coverage
reasonItems.description: Ensures prompt claims handling with included assistance, towing, and emergency services.

description.paragraph: Mandatory in Switzerland, motor vehicle insurance covers damages caused to third parties and ensures compliance with legal obligations in case of an accident.
It also protects your vehicle against theft or weather-related incidents, with swift assistance and compensation in case of a claim.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: The essentials of protecting your vehicle daily.

faqs.question: What insurance options are available for my vehicle?
faqs.answer: Liability, partial casco, or full casco, depending on your needs, vehicle type, and value.

faqs.question: What guarantees are covered by liability insurance?
faqs.answer: Liability insurance covers material and bodily damages you cause to others during an accident.

faqs.question: How is my car insurance premium calculated?
faqs.answer: It depends on the vehicle, your age, driving history, place of residence, and chosen guarantees.

faqs.question: Am I covered in case of an accident abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, most motor vehicle insurance contracts cover you in case of an incident abroad.

faqs.question: What is the difference between liability, partial casco, and full casco?
faqs.answer:
Liability (mandatory): Covers damages caused to others.
Partial casco: Covers non-accident-related damages (theft, fire, glass breakage, natural events).
Full casco: Includes partial casco and also covers damages to your own vehicle in case of responsible accident.

reasonItems.description: Offers legal support and guaranteed protection in case of conflicts with a neighbor, employer, or service provider.

reasonItems.title: Covered Expenses
reasonItems.description: Covers lawyer fees, procedural costs, and expert opinions in case of contractual disputes or tax litigation.

reasonItems.title: Defense of Your Rights
reasonItems.description: Legal experts by your side to advise you and assert your rights and interests.

description.paragraph: Legal protection insurance protects you and defends your rights in everyday disputes, without you having to bear the legal costs alone.
It facilitates access to justice by covering costs related to advice, procedures, or mediations, whether in private or contractual conflicts.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Understand how legal protection insurance helps you resolve your conflicts.

faqs.question: In what cases can I use legal protection insurance?
faqs.answer: In case of disputes related to consumption, neighborhood, work, contracts, or housing, legal protection intervenes.

faqs.question: Can I subscribe individually or must I cover my entire family?
faqs.answer: You can subscribe individually, but some contracts also cover your partner and children.

faqs.question: Does legal protection insurance cover all legal fees?
faqs.answer: Legal fees are reimbursed within the limits and conditions of the contract, depending on the covered amount and nature of the dispute.

faqs.question: Does legal protection insurance intervene before any trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, it can also cover mediation or legal advice to avoid judicial proceedings.

reasonItems.title: Employee Protection
reasonItems.description: Ensures medical and financial support in case of work-related accidents or illnesses.

description.paragraph: Domestic employee insurance allows you to fulfill your legal obligations while protecting the employee in case of accidents, illness, or work incapacity.
It covers medical care, daily allowances, and social security contributions for the employee. This enables you to limit financial risks in case of disputes or prolonged absences.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about your rights and obligations as a private employer.

faqs.question: Mandatory Insurance
faqs.answer: It states that certain insurances, including accident insurance under the LAA, are legally mandatory when hiring a domestic employee in Switzerland.

faqs.question: Health Insurance
faqs.answer: Health insurance is optional but strongly recommended to ensure the employee receives income in case of illness.

faqs.question: Social Insurance Contributions
faqs.answer: The employer is responsible for paying social insurance contributions such as AHV, AI, or LPP.

faqs.question: Voluntary Additional Coverage
faqs.answer: Employers can subscribe to voluntary additional coverage, including coverage for non-professional accidents or legal protection.

reasonItems.description: Compensation in case of loss, theft, or damage to your personal belongings during the trip.

description.paragraph: Taking out travel insurance helps you handle unexpected events while away from home, without compromising your budget or the peace of your trip.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Prepare and insure yourself well to avoid nasty surprises abroad.

faqs.question: Can I purchase travel insurance after departure?
faqs.answer: Some companies allow it, but coverage may be limited or delayed. It’s advisable to subscribe before departure.

faqs.question: Does travel insurance cover last-minute cancellations?
faqs.answer: Yes, if the cancellation is justified (illness, accident, serious unforeseen event), expenses may be partially or fully reimbursed.

faqs.question: What should I do in case of lost or stolen luggage?
faqs.answer: The insurance compensates according to the contract terms, with assistance to report and manage the incident on-site.

faqs.question: Should I opt for per-trip or annual insurance?
faqs.answer: For frequent travelers, annual insurance is often more economical and practical than individual coverage.

reasonItems.title: Tranquillité assurée

Content.subHeading: Why Take Building and Property ((Liability)) Insurance?

description.paragraph: Building liability insurance financially protects the owner in case of damages caused to third parties by the building, even without personal fault.
It ensures coverage for repairs and compensation in case of incidents involving common areas, technical installations, or defective external elements.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Understand your responsibilities and protections as a property owner.

faqs.question: Is building liability insurance mandatory for property owners?
faqs.answer: It’s not always mandatory, but strongly recommended to protect against liability in case of incidents involving your property.

faqs.question: Does this insurance cover damages caused to tenants?
faqs.answer: Yes, if the damage results from a defect in the building, such as a leak or structural collapse.

faqs.question: What happens if I don't have building liability insurance?
faqs.answer: You must personally bear all costs related to repairs and compensation in case of an incident.

faqs.question: Which parts of the building are covered by this insurance?
faqs.answer: Common areas, roofs, facades, fixed installations, and annexes are covered by building liability insurance.

reasonItems.title: Adapted Coverage
reasonItems.description: Offers health protection aligned with your actual needs, both in Switzerland and your country of residence.

reasonItems.title: Simplified Administration
reasonItems.description: Features an insurance plan specially designed for cross-border workers, with streamlined and practical administrative procedures.

description.paragraph: Cross-border worker insurance enables you to benefit from essential health coverage and social protection between your country of residence and your workplace.
Without this insurance, you risk incurring high costs in case of illness or accident and may not be covered according to current regulations.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: The essential points to be well-insured as a cross-border worker.

faqs.question: Is this insurance mandatory for all cross-border workers?
faqs.answer: Yes, it’s mandatory for cross-border workers to ensure health coverage between their country of residence and their country of employment.

faqs.question: Does cross-border insurance cover all medical expenses?
faqs.answer: It covers most medical expenses, but certain specific costs may not be covered, depending on the chosen coverage.

faqs.question: What are the deadlines for choosing cross-border insurance?
faqs.answer: You generally have three months after starting your activity in Switzerland to make your insurance choice.

faqs.question: Can I change my cross-border insurance during the contract?
faqs.answer: Yes, it’s possible to change your cross-border insurance under certain conditions, especially if you change your country of residence or professional situation.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Prepare for the future calmly to protect your loved ones and your standard of living.

faqs.question: What happens to my LPP assets with this insurance?
faqs.answer: They are transferred to a vested benefits account or policy, secured until you resume work or retire.

faqs.question: What are the tax advantages of vested benefits?
faqs.answer:
The assets are exempt from wealth tax and generate returns according to the chosen contract.
Moreover, your assets are protected under the contract terms, with a regulated minimum interest rate.

faqs.question: Can I freely withdraw funds from my vested benefits account or policy?
faqs.answer: Withdrawals are regulated by law and are possible in specific cases such as purchasing a primary residence, starting a business as a self-employed individual, or permanently leaving Switzerland (subject to conditions).

faqs.question: What happens to my assets if I find a new job?
faqs.answer: They are automatically transferred to your new employer's pension fund.

BookConsultation.subHeading: A question? Our ((advisors)) are here to guide you
BookConsultation.description: Benefit from personalized advice and support that meets your needs.

description.paragraph: Optimizes wealth transfer with a flexible and tax-advantaged savings solution.

reasonItems.description: Builds long-term capital with returns and flexibility aligned with your objectives.

reasonItems.title: Facilitated Transfer
reasonItems.description: Allows for the transfer of assets outside of the estate, offering tax benefits to designated beneficiaries.

reasonItems.title: Financial Security
reasonItems.description: Provides capital to loved ones in the event of the insured’s death, ensuring their economic stability.

description.paragraph: Life insurance is an effective solution to anticipate unforeseen events, financially protect your loved ones, and build long-term savings.
With flexible management, life insurance adapts to your wealth objectives: facilitated transfer, tax optimization, or secure investment according to the subscriber’s profile.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Understand the functioning, issues, and benefits of life insurance.

faqs.question: What are the different investment options in a life insurance policy?
faqs.answer: Investments can be made in euro, CHF, or dollar funds for more security, or in unit-linked accounts for higher return potential with greater risk.

faqs.question: What are the tax advantages of life insurance?
faqs.answer: Life insurance offers tax benefits on gains, as well as on premiums paid, depending on the contract duration and invested amounts.

faqs.question: Who can benefit from a life insurance policy?
faqs.answer: Anyone can subscribe to a life insurance policy, either for their own capital or to designate specific beneficiaries in case of death.

faqs.question: Can money be withdrawn from a life insurance policy?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can withdraw money from your life insurance policy at any time, under certain conditions, with favorable taxation if you comply with the contract duration.

BookConsultation.description: Benefit from personalized advice and support that meets your needs.

description.paragraph: Maintains your pension rights and preserves your LPP funds between two jobs.

reasonItems.title: Protected Capital
reasonItems.description: Safeguards your pension assets securely during transitional periods.

reasonItems.title: Flexible Management
reasonItems.description: Allows you to manage your assets freely until reemployment or retirement.

reasonItems.title: Vested Benefits Account
reasonItems.description: Keeps your pension assets secure and ensures no loss of rights during periods without affiliation.

description.paragraph: When temporarily leaving the workforce, vested benefits insurance helps secure your pension assets and preserves your retirement rights.
It guarantees your capital and coverage in case of unforeseen events until your return to employment or retirement.

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Understand your coverage with vested benefits insurance in case of career interruption or transition.

faqs.question: How does private pension insurance complement AVS and LPP?
faqs.answer: AVS and LPP cover approximately 60% of income in the event of retirement, death, or disability. Private pension insurance helps bridge this gap.

faqs.question: Can it be adapted in case of a change in situation?
faqs.answer: Yes, contracts are adjustable in the event of marriage, birth, income change, or professional status change.

faqs.question: Can multiple pension contracts be combined?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to subscribe to multiple contracts to diversify coverage and spread risks.

faqs.question: Are there coverage limitations for private pension insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, some insurances impose age limits, medical exclusions, or waiting periods depending on the chosen coverage.

faqs.question: What happens to my assets if I find a new job?
faqs.answer: They are automatically transferred to your new employer’s pension fund.

ProfessionLiberale.description: Tailored insurance to secure the activity and income of self-employed professionals.

AssuranceChosesEtPatrimoine.title: Assurance Genevoise - Property and Asset Insurance
AssuranceChosesEtPatrimoine.description: Preserve your assets and secure your future against unforeseen events with our coverage for real estate, equipment, and capital.

RcProfessionnelle.title: Assurance Genevoise - Professional Liability Insurance
RcProfessionnelle.description: Benefit from comprehensive coverage tailored to your business sector to protect your assets and ensure your company's growth.

AssuranceRcMenage.title: Assurance Genevoise - Liability Insurance (RC)
AssuranceRcMenage.description: Protect your liability, your assets, and your daily life from property and bodily damage caused to third parties.

AssuranceAnimaux.title: Assurance Genevoise - Pet Insurance
AssuranceAnimaux.description: Protect your pet’s health and cover the costs in case of illness, accident, or emergency.

AssuranceAccidentLaa.title: Assurance Genevoise - Accident Insurance (LAA)
AssuranceAccidentLaa.description: Protects your employees in the event of occupational or non-occupational accidents, covering medical expenses, daily allowances, and rehabilitation.

AssuranceVoyage.title: Assurance Genevoise - Travel Insurance
AssuranceVoyage.description: Security, assistance, and peace of mind at every stage of your trips abroad with coverage tailored to your needs.

AssurancePerteGain.title: Assurance Genevoise - Income Loss Insurance
AssurancePerteGain.description: Essential coverage to ensure your employees' income continuity and secure your business against unforeseen events.

PrevoyanceProfessionnelleLpp.title: Assurance Genevoise - Occupational Pension (LPP)
PrevoyanceProfessionnelleLpp.description: The occupational pension (LPP) complements the AVS, ensuring your employees a secure retirement and protection in case of disability or death.

CautionsGaranties.title: Assurance Genevoise - Surety and Guarantee Insurance
CautionsGaranties.description: Secure your projects and ensure the execution of your contracts with reliable guarantees compliant with your professional obligations.

AssuranceVehicule.title: Assurance Genevoise - Motor Vehicle Insurance
AssuranceVehicule.description: Essential coverage to protect your vehicle, your passengers, and cover damages caused to others.

AssuranceProtectionJuridique.title: Assurance Genevoise - Legal Protection Insurance
AssuranceProtectionJuridique.description: Legal assistance, support, and management of private disputes to assert your rights in any situation.

ProtectionJuridique.title: Assurance Genevoise – Legal Protection Insurance
ProtectionJuridique.description: Legal assistance, legal support, and management of professional disputes to uphold your rights in any situation.

AssuranceEmployeMaison.title: Assurance Genevoise - Domestic Employee Insurance
AssuranceEmployeMaison.description: Protect your domestic employees, cover risks related to their work, and secure your liability in case of an incident.

AssuranceHommeCle.title: Assurance Genevoise - Key Person Insurance
AssuranceHommeCle.description: Preserve your company's financial stability in the event of the loss or absence of a leader or strategic profile.

AssurancePerteExploitation.title: Assurance Genevoise - Business Interruption Insurance
AssurancePerteExploitation.description: Protect your business against financial losses related to a claim, business stoppage, or forced interruption.

AssuranceCyber.title: Assurance Genevoise - Cybersecurity Insurance
AssuranceCyber.description: Comprehensive protection against cyber incidents to safeguard your systems and data.

AssuranceRcImmeuble.title: Assurance Genevoise - Building and Property Liability Insurance
AssuranceRcImmeuble.description: Cover material or bodily damages caused to third parties by your building, its equipment, or installations.

AssuranceFrontalier.title: Assurance Genevoise - Cross-border Worker Insurance
AssuranceFrontalier.description: Clear and tailored health coverage for cross-border workers employed in Switzerland and residing in France.

AssuranceLibrePassage.title: Assurance Genevoise - Vested Benefits Insurance
AssuranceLibrePassage.description: Maintain your pension rights and protect your LPP assets between jobs or during a professional transition.

AssurancePrevoyance.title: Assurance Genevoise - Private Pension Insurance
AssurancePrevoyance.description: Secure your financial future, protect your loved ones, and ensure a peaceful retirement at every stage of life.

AssuranceVie.title: Assurance Genevoise - Life Insurance
AssuranceVie.description: Optimize the transfer of your assets with a flexible and tax-advantaged savings solution.

AssuranceMaladieInternational.title: Assurance Genevoise – International Health Insurance
AssuranceMaladieInternational.description: Adapt your mandatory health coverage to your new country of residence: benefit from comprehensive protection that meets local requirements so you can travel and work abroad with complete peace of mind.

CouverturesSpecifiques.title: Assurance Genevoise – International Specific Coverages
CouverturesSpecifiques.description: Secure your activities worldwide with tailor-made insurance programs; protect your employees, assets and international projects, and grow your business with confidence.

CouverturesDediees.title: Assurance Genevoise – Dedicated Coverages
CouverturesDediees.description: Insurance products designed for healthcare professionals, lawyers, fiduciaries and consultants: protect your income and professional liability with bespoke coverage.

Hypotheque.title: Assurance Genevoise – Mortgage
Hypotheque.description: Assess the risks and opportunities of purchasing property in Switzerland: benefit from coverage tailored to your liquidity, your pension planning and the impact of your investment.

Prevoyance.title: Assurance Genevoise – Pension Planning
Prevoyance.description: Prepare for retirement and ensure the security of your loved ones with comprehensive pension planning based on the three pillars of the Swiss system.

Sante.title: Assurance Genevoise – Health
Sante.description: Health-insurance solutions tailored to every need: LAMal, supplementary, prenatal or international, to protect your health wherever you are.

TaxesEtFiscalite.title: Assurance Genevoise – Taxes and Taxation
TaxesEtFiscalite.description: Control your taxes, anticipate your liabilities and secure your financial future thanks to our targeted expertise in tax optimisation.
